title: Section 35
content: 1[Every Institute] shall have the power to grant degrees, diplomas, certificates and other academic distinctions under this Act, which shall be equivalent to such corresponding degrees, diplomas, certificates and other academic distinctions granted by any University or Institute established or incorporated under any other law for the time being in force.
footnote: 1. Subs. by s. 29, ibid., for "The Institute" (w.e.f. 13-1-2020).
